stemHtml: Consider a twin propeller aeroplane with wing-mounted engines that has suffered an engine failure. Which of the following situations and engine configurations would result in the least asymmetric yaw and roll being developed?

options.a: The failure of the right engine on a twin with counter-rotating propellers that rotate inwards.
options.b: The failure of the right engine on a twin with counter-rotating propellers that rotate outwards.
options.c: The failure of the left engine on a twin with two right-hand propellers.
options.d: The failure of the left engine on a twin with counter-rotating propellers that rotate outwards.
